message:
Running command: 
# "Complete detail routing." - DRT IS DONE!
# 5h40m CPU / ~98min elapsed.
# 
# Now OpenROAD will:
# 1. write_db to drt-run-0 (already done at 04:34)
# 2. check_antennas
# 3. If needed: repair_antennas + re-route
# 4. write_views (write DEF, ODB, etc. to step dir)
# 5. Exit
# 
# Then LibreLane will:
# - Write state_out.json
# - Create step 72 (next step) - FillInsertion or similar
# 
# Monitor very closely!

echo "=== DRT COMPLETE! $(date) ==="

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 5
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED!" && break

    dd if=/proc/1100961/fd/11 bs=262144 count=256 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 3; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -5 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEP71=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^config\|^COMMANDS\|^_env\|^state" | head -5 | tr '\n' ',')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP 71=[$STEP71] | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done

function.name: execute_bash
